user_input: How deep can the HMMWV ford water without a deep water fording kit?
retrieved_contexts:
['TM 9-2320-280-10
2-37.  DEEP WATER FORDING OPERATION
a.  General .  The deep water fording kit allows M998 series vehicles to ford water up to 60 in. (152 cm)
deep.
CAUTION
Never attempt deep water fording unless water depth is known to be 60 in. (152
cm) or less, and bottom is known to be hard.  Do not exceed 5 mph (8 kph) during
fording operation.  Damage to vehicle will result.
b.  Before Operation.
NOTE
Retain all parts removed for reuse.
(1) Raise and secure hood (para. 3-8).
(2) Loosen clamp (3) and remove weathercap (2) and clamp (3) from shield (12).
(3) Remove three capscrews (16), washers (15), and shield (12) from cowling (10).  Stow shield (12).
(4) Install intake assembly vent tube (8) on air intake assembly (1) with two clips (14) and screws (13).', '(220). The vehicles ford hard bottom water crossings up to 30 inches (76 centimeters) without a deep-water
fording kit and 60 inches (152 centimeters) with the kit.  Refer to table 1-15 for cruising range.
d. Special Limitations. None.
e. Special Instructions in the Manual.
(1) Refer to paragraph 2-2, Controls, Indicators, and Equipment.
(2) Refer to chapter 2, section VI, TOW/Armament Carrier Operation.
1-14', '40% (22°). The vehicles ford hard bottom water crossings up to 30 inches (76 centimeters) without a deep
water fording kit and 60 inches (152 centimeters) with the kit. Refer to table 1-15 for cruising range.
d. Special Limitations. None.
e. Special Instructions in the Manual.
(1) Refer to paragraph 2-2, Controls, Indicators, and Equipment.
(2) Refer to chapter 2, section VI, TOW/Armament Carrier Operation.
1-12', 'a deep water fording kit.
CAUTION
Never attempt shallow water fording unless water depth is known to be 30 in. (76
cm) or less, and bottom is known to be hard.  Do not exceed 5 mph (8 kph) during
fording operation.  Damage to vehicle will result.
b.  Before Operation.
(1)Make sure oil dipstick, transmission dipstick, oil filler cap, and fuel tank cap are secure.
(2)Secure all loose objects on vehicle.
(3)Make sure battery caps are all present and tight.
WARNING
Do not allow tools to come in contact with vehicle
when disconnecting or connecting slave receptacle
cable.  Tool contact with vehicle will result in a
direct short, causing instant heating of tool, tool
damage, and injury to personnel.
NOTE
Perform steps 4 through 6 only if fording in salt
water.']
response:
The HMMWV M998 can ford hard bottom water crossings up to **30 inches (76 centimeters)** without a deep water fording kit [2][3].

**CAUTION:** Never attempt shallow water fording unless water depth is known to be 30 in. (76 cm) or less, and the bottom is known to be hard. Do not exceed 5 mph (8 kph) during fording operation. Damage to vehicle will result [4].
reference: The HMMWV can ford hard-bottom water crossings up to 30 inches (76 centimeters) deep without a deep water fording kit, and up to 60 inches (152 centimeters) with the kit installed.

response:
The excerpts provided do not contain the fuel tank capacity for the HMMWV. 

Excerpt [4] shows a compatibility table for various HMMWV models with trailers, but does not list fuel tank specifications. To find this information, you would need to consult the fuel system section or specifications table in the HMMWV operator's manual (TM 9-2320-280-10), likely in an earlier section covering vehicle capacities similar to the format shown in excerpt [1] for the M939 truck.
reference: The HMMWV fuel tank holds 25 gallons (94.6 liters).
